run_metadata.coverage_summary: Tier 1 government portals swept via web search (AusTender, buy.nsw/NSW eTendering, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA/SA/Tas/NT, Tenders ACT). Tier 2 sampled (Sydney Water, Melbourne Water, SA Water, VendorPanel local government, universities RMIT/Monash, WAPHA). Tier 3 attempted (SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network, Transgrid iBuy/Ariba, NBN Co suppliers). As on the previous run, detail-page extraction was NOT possible: WebFetch and curl via the egress proxy returned HTTP 403 (CONNECT rejected by org egress policy) for EVERY host attempted, including AusTender, buy.nsw, and a non-AU control (en.wikipedia.org). All captured opportunities are therefore headline-level, drawn from official-portal search-result snippets, and flagged as pending a detailed deliverables pass. No deliverables, contacts, values or dates were inferred where not explicitly seen; unconfirmed dates were left null.
gaps: WebFetch AND curl-via-proxy both returned HTTP 403 (gateway 'connect_rejected' / policy denial) for ALL hosts attempted this run — confirmed against tenders.gov.au, buy.nsw.gov.au and a non-AU control (en.wikipedia.org via curl, recorded in the proxy's recentRelayFailures). This is an environment-level egress restriction, not a per-site login wall. Consequently no tender detail pages or specification documents could be opened; deliverables_summary, key_deliverables, requirements, evaluation_criteria, exact publish/closing dates and contacts could not be captured for any opportunity.

All five captured tenders remain at headline level (title, buyer, tender id, source URL, and whatever the search snippet exposed). Closing dates and full scope must be re-captured once fetch access is restored.

GambleAware Support Services RFT (buy.nsw RFT-2008410, Office of Responsible Gambling NSW) surfaced but appears to have been superseded/awarded (news item 'Announcement of new service providers for GambleAware services across NSW'; snippet showed an old close date of 08-Sep-2025) — treated as NOT currently open and excluded from tenders. Buyer noted only.

South Australia — 'Moonta Road Construction Stage 2 & 3' (closing ~16-Jul-2026) and 'Cowandilla Reserve Recreation & Community Facility' (posted ~8-Jul-2026) surfaced only via an aggregator snippet (australiantenders.com.au), not confirmable on tenders.sa.gov.au with WebFetch down. Treated as discovery signal only, NOT recorded as tenders.

University opportunities (RMIT prequalified Architects panel EOI, RMIT Campus Security Services RFP, Monash Moodle Managed Services) surfaced via aggregators (australiantenders.com.au / govmarket.com.au); could not be confirmed on the buyers' own portals with WebFetch down, so NOT recorded as tenders. Buyer portals captured in discovered_sources for a future authenticated/fetch-enabled pass.

Tier 3 corporate (SAP Ariba Discovery, Transgrid iBuy/Ariba, NBN Co) checked but individual live AU RFx are login/registration-gated; with WebFetch down no publicly-visible corporate RFx could be confirmed. No corporate opportunity fabricated. Portals recorded in discovered_sources / already known.

Victoria (Buying for Victoria), Queensland (QTenders), Tenders WA, Tenders Tasmania and NT QTOL: only landing pages and a few already-known cross-listed refs surfaced via search; no NEW state-specific open opportunity could be verified to headline level this run — deferred to the next fetch-enabled run.
recommended_seed_additions: Monash University — Strategic Procurement / eTendering portal (Victorian university buyer running RFT/RFP/RFQ/RFI/EOI via a TenderLink-hosted portal; not previously tracked).
WA Primary Health Alliance (WAPHA) — Tenders (Perth North / Perth South / Country WA PHN commissioning body; runs RFQs e.g. Bondi 2025 Response education & training support; not previously tracked).
Cootamundra-Gundagai Regional Council (NSW) — Tenders / EOI / RFQ (individual council buyer surfaced via VendorPanel-style search; not previously tracked).

tenders.title: Drinking Water Program EPCM - Request for Expression of Interest
tenders.description: Sydney Water is seeking Expressions of Interest from suitably qualified and experienced organisations to participate in the upcoming tender process for the provision of Engineering, Procurement and Construction Management (EPCM) services as part of its Drinking Water Program, a portfolio of complex multi-disciplinary projects with an estimated delivery window of 2026-2032.
tenders.submission_method: Lodge via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering (Sydney Water SAP Ariba for downstream tender stage)
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of Sydney Water current tenders; captured from the buyer-originated buy.nsw (NSW eTendering) opportunity listing SWC-WS5192918179, not from an aggregator.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. Closing date and full scope not captured because WebFetch/curl were blocked (HTTP 403 egress policy) this run. Sydney Water runs prequalification/tender detail through SAP Ariba; verify open status and dates on a fetch-enabled run.

tenders.title: Circular Economy Zone - Request for Expressions of Interest
tenders.category: Circular economy / resource recovery / commercial arrangements
tenders.description: Sydney Water is seeking Expressions of Interest (reference WS5038645409) relating to a Circular Economy Zone, inviting parties interested in establishing commercial arrangements associated with resource recovery / beneficial reuse in its operations.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of Sydney Water buy.nsw opportunities; captured from the buyer-originated buy.nsw listing EOI-2004959 (WS5038645409).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. Scope, closing date and eligibility not captured — WebFetch/curl blocked (HTTP 403) this run. Confirm open status and detail on a fetch-enabled run.

tenders.title: Delivery Contractor Panels - Registration of Interest
tenders.description: Sydney Water Registration of Interest (reference WS4915925121) to establish Delivery Contractor Panels for the delivery of its infrastructure works program.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of Sydney Water buy.nsw opportunities; captured from the buyer-originated buy.nsw Registration of Interest listing SWC-WS4915925121.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. Panel scope, categories, closing date and prequalification requirements not captured — WebFetch/curl blocked (HTTP 403) this run. Confirm open status on a fetch-enabled run.

tenders.title: Landscape Maintenance Services
tenders.description: Sydney Harbour Federation Trust (Harbour Trust) approach to market on AusTender for the provision of Landscape Maintenance Services across its sites.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of the AusTender current ATM list; buyer-originated Commonwealth notice (ATM ID SHFT26001, Sydney Harbour Federation Trust).
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. Closing date 13-Jul-2026 (ACT local, 2:00 PM) taken from an AusTender search snippet — closes on the run date, so may already be closed by the time of processing. Scope/documents not captured — WebFetch blocked (HTTP 403) this run.

tenders.title: Millicent Wastewater Treatment Plant Upgrade - Design & Construct EOI
tenders.description: SA Water invites suitably experienced and qualified organisations to submit an Expression of Interest to design and construct the Millicent Wastewater Treatment Plant Upgrade.
tenders.submission_method: Via SA Tenders and Contracts (tenders.sa.gov.au) / SA Water supplier process
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of SA Water tenders; captured from SA Water's own tenders-and-contracts page description, cross-published on SA Tenders and Contracts (tenders.sa.gov.au) — buyer-originated, not an aggregator.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only, and open status unconfirmed: no tender_id, closing date or documents captured because WebFetch/curl were blocked (HTTP 403) this run. Verify the opportunity is still open and capture the tenders.sa.gov.au reference on a fetch-enabled run.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Web search for Australian university procurement portals; Monash's Strategic Procurement division runs an eTendering portal distributing RFT/RFP/RFQ/RFI/EOI market-engagement documents (e.g. Moodle Managed Services partner engagement).
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated university procurement channel. Not previously in the known-source set. Detail could not be opened this run (WebFetch HTTP 403).

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced in a Tenders WA search; WAPHA (commissioning body for Perth North, Perth South and Country WA PHNs) publishes its own RFQs/tenders (e.g. RFQ994 Bondi 2025 Response Education & Training Support - Perth North PHN).
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated health commissioning body with its own tender page. Not previously tracked.

discovered_sources.source_name: Cootamundra-Gundagai Regional Council (CGRC) — Tenders / EOI / RFQ
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced in a VendorPanel public-tenders / local government search; individual NSW council publishing tenders, EOIs and RFQs on its own site.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated local government source not previously tracked. Add to the council rotation.

discovered_sources.source_name: Transgrid — Suppliers (iBuy / SAP Ariba) + NSW eTendering sub-portal
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Confirmed this run: Transgrid runs procurement through SAP Ariba (branded 'iBuy') requiring supplier registration, and also has a dedicated NSW eTendering sub-portal at tenders.nsw.gov.au/transgrid.
discovered_sources.notes: Already known (Transgrid iBuy/Ariba). Recording the tenders.nsw.gov.au/transgrid sub-portal URL for completeness. Individual RFx are registration-gated; no publicly-visible RFx captured this run.

discovered_sources.source_name: SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 mandatory check; public posting board where buyers post open RFx. Full opportunity detail requires a free supplier account (supplier.ariba.com).
discovered_sources.notes: Already known. Checked this run but no publicly-visible AU RFx could be confirmed (registration-gated; WebFetch HTTP 403). No corporate opportunity fabricated.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 rotating check; NBN Co uses RFI/RFQ/RFP/RFT sourcing and directs prospective suppliers to supplierpolicies@nbnco.com.au.
discovered_sources.notes: Already known. Registration/invitation-gated; no publicly-visible RFx captured this run.
